title: ferray-autodiff: powf has division by zero and undefined ln at x=0 and x<0
description:
Steps to reproduce:
1. 

Expected: 
Actual: 

powf() computes 'self.real.ln()' in the dual part formula, which is -inf at x=0 and NaN at x<0. The formula 'val * (p.dual * self.real.ln() + p.real * self.dual / self.real)' also divides by self.real, which is 0/0 at x=0. For x^p: at x=0 with p>1, the derivative should be 0; at x=0 with p=1, it's 1; at x<0 with integer p, it should delegate to powi. Handle these edge cases explicitly.
